overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a covered wooden pier in Blackwater. The character walks through the covered section to the open pier end, observes the lake and distant shoreline with binoculars, then walks back toward the town entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden pier walkway with white railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered section of the pier toward the open water end

notable_agents.action: woman in period dress holding a fan walking toward the camera
man in suspenders walking away from camera along the pier

entered.detail: white wooden truss roof structure with decorative cutouts covering the pier walkway
ornate white painted wooden railings with X-pattern design along pier edges
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway surface
calm lake water visible through the side railings of the pier
black ornate lanterns mounted on white wooden posts along the pier

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the covered section of a wooden pier, passing other pedestrians in period clothing. The white wooden roof structure and railings create a sheltered corridor with glimpses of water visible through the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier section extending over the water

events.description: exits the covered pier roof into the open sunlit section with water visible on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pier toward the end overlooking the lake

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing at the railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: tree-covered hills and green landscape visible across the lake
wooden buildings of the town visible on the distant shore across the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered structure, the character walks along the open pier with water visible on both sides. The distant tree-covered shoreline and town buildings come into view ahead as the character approaches the pier end.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end observation point with panoramic water views

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the pier end to observe the surroundings
character raises binoculars to eyes to scout the distant shoreline and buildings

agents.ego_description: standing still at the pier end, slowly panning the camera to survey the lake, distant town, and shoreline, using binoculars for a closer look

entered.detail: large wooden building with blue painted signage reading Blackwater visible when panning right

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the pier end observing the panoramic view of the lake and distant shoreline. The camera pans across the water revealing the Blackwater building and town across the lake, and the character uses binoculars to scout the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: return walk along pier toward covered entrance

events.description: character lowers binoculars and begins walking back toward the covered pier section
approaches the stairs and roofed entrance of the covered pier section with Blackwater sign

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier toward the town entrance, passing NPCs standing at the railings

notable_agents.action: man leaning over the white railing looking down at the water
woman standing with arms crossed near the covered entrance

entered.detail: stairs and white wooden roof structure with Blackwater signage marking the pier entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the pier toward the covered entrance, passing other pedestrians standing at the railings. The Blackwater building becomes more prominent on the right as the character approaches the stairs leading back under the covered roof.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a wooden pier out toward a wide panoramic vista of a lakeside town. It begins within a covered corridor of white wooden roofing and railings, moving past pedestrians in period clothing with glimpses of water through the sides. As the character exits the structure, the scene opens into an expansive open-air pier where the distant tree-covered shoreline and town buildings gradually come into view. The camera then pans across the lake to reveal the Blackwater skyline while the character uses binoculars to scout the area from the pier's end. Finally, the perspective shifts as the character walks back toward the covered entrance, passing bystanders at the railings while the town buildings grow more prominent on the right before returning under the roof.
